scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:no-llm" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:llm: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:llm" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && cross-env BROWSER=none npm start
scripts.dev:frontend:no-llm: cd frontend && cross-env BROWSER=none REACT_APP_ENABLE_LLM=false npm start
scripts.dev:frontend:llm: cd frontend && cross-env BROWSER=none REACT_APP_ENABLE_LLM=true npm start
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron dist/electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:electron && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder build
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder build --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder build --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder build --linux
scripts.clean: rimraf dist && rimraf frontend/build && rimraf backend/dist
